overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire running through a desert canyon. The character moves steadily from a narrow rocky passage into a wide open canyon basin with towering cliff formations, under bright midday sun with clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with high rock walls

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the narrow canyon passage between towering rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall dark rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the canyon
sandy desert floor with visible tire tracks and footprints

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow desert canyon with high rocky walls closing in on both sides. The sandy ground shows travel tracks, and the sky is visible only as a narrow strip overhead. The environment is empty and quiet, with sparse vegetation visible on the cliff sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening desert canyon with approaching cliff formation

events.description: canyon widens significantly as the character emerges from the narrow passage into a more open area
large cliff face becomes visible in the distance ahead as the canyon opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward as the canyon opens up, approaching the large cliff formation ahead

entered.detail: massive light-colored rocky cliff face with layered striations visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually widens, causing the side walls to recede into the distance. A massive cliff face comes into view ahead, dominating the horizon. The character continues running across the sandy floor toward this central rock formation as the environment transitions from enclosed to semi-open.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon basin with towering cliff ahead

agents.ego_description: running toward the massive cliff face that now fills the view ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive cliff face in a wide open canyon basin. The side walls are now distant slopes, and the sky is fully visible overhead. The large cliff dominates the view ahead, showing detailed rock textures and layers as the character draws closer to the canyon's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from a claustrophobic rocky passage into a vast, open canyon basin. It begins within a narrow desert corridor where high rocky walls close in on both sides, leaving only a thin strip of sky visible overhead. As the character advances across the tracked sandy ground, the canyon gradually widens and the side walls recede, revealing a massive cliff face that begins to dominate the horizon. The scene then expands into a wide basin where the side walls become distant slopes and the sky opens fully. Finally, the camera draws closer to the towering central rock formation, highlighting its detailed textures and layers as the character reaches the end of the canyon.
